recommended_pattern: Hero + Feature Cards + CTA Strip + Pricing
color_mood: Trust blue + orange CTA
typography_mood: Professional hierarchy clear
key_effects: Subtle hover 200ms; smooth transitions; card lift 4px
decision_rules: Match glassmorphism if data-heavy; flat if content-first; always include pricing anchor
anti_patterns: Excessive animation; dark mode forced; no pricing visible above fold

recommended_pattern: Hero-Centric + Single CTA + Trust Row
color_mood: Bold primary + accent contrast
typography_mood: Modern readable energetic
key_effects: CTA pulse 2s if bold brand; fast fade-in 200ms
decision_rules: If pre-launch use waitlist; if single feature keep hero 100vh; always one primary CTA only
anti_patterns: Multiple competing CTAs; no trust signals; hidden pricing

recommended_pattern: Sidebar Command + Code Area + Top Bar
color_mood: Monochrome dark or light; accent for interactive
typography_mood: Monospace for code; system sans for UI
key_effects: Focus ring always visible; code syntax highlight; no transition on code blocks
decision_rules: Dark mode default for code-heavy; keyboard-first; no hover-only actions; breadcrumb nav
anti_patterns: Bright pastel colors in code area; round cards around code blocks

recommended_pattern: Split Sidebar + Data Table + Action Bar
color_mood: Neutral slate; status colors with icons
typography_mood: System sans compact; 13-14px for table rows
key_effects: Row hover highlight 150ms; sticky header; column sort animation
decision_rules: Prioritize scanability; group related filters; bulk actions in action bar not context menu
anti_patterns: Nested 3+ level sidebar; too many colors for status indicators; data truncated without tooltip

recommended_pattern: Product Grid + Filter Sidebar + Cart Drawer
color_mood: Brand primary + success green
typography_mood: Readable engaging clear hierarchy
key_effects: Card hover scale 1.02 200ms; drawer slide 300ms; skeleton on load
decision_rules: Show social proof (ratings) on card; urgency scarcity only when real; fast checkout via drawer
anti_patterns: Filter that forces page reload; product cards without price; checkout behind auth wall

recommended_pattern: Curated Hero + Product Showcase + Brand Story
color_mood: Midnight gold or stone + gold accent
typography_mood: Elegant serif heading; refined body
key_effects: Slow fade-in 400ms; subtle parallax; chromatic text optional
decision_rules: Never show sale price prominently; no countdown timers; editorial narrative before CTA
anti_patterns: Flash sale urgency tactics; excessive animation; crowded grid; promotional banners

recommended_pattern: Tab Bar + Card Feed + Sheet Modal
color_mood: System colors with brand tint
typography_mood: SF Pro Display + SF Pro Text
key_effects: Spring animation 350ms; haptic implied; blur on modal sheet
decision_rules: Follow Apple HIG tab bar 3-5 items; use sheets not modal dialogs; respect safe areas
anti_patterns: Non-standard navigation patterns; web-style dropdowns; modal covering full screen without handle

recommended_pattern: Bottom Nav + List/Grid + FAB + Bottom Sheet
color_mood: Dynamic color tonal; brand as seed
typography_mood: Roboto or Google Sans
key_effects: Shared element 300ms; FAB morph; tonal surface elevation
decision_rules: Use FAB for primary action; bottom nav 3-5 items; dynamic color from user wallpaper; M3 components
anti_patterns: Hard-coded primary color ignoring Material You; non-standard FAB behavior; scrollable tabs >5

recommended_pattern: KPI Row + Chart Grid + Filter Bar + Time Range
color_mood: Status colors with text labels; muted palette
typography_mood: System mono for numbers; system sans for labels
key_effects: Chart transitions 400ms; KPI counter 800ms; tooltip fade 150ms; no layout shift
decision_rules: Default to most important KPI first; persist filter state in URL; provide CSV export always
anti_patterns: Pie charts for >4 categories; chart colors without text labels; filter state lost on refresh

recommended_pattern: Multi-Chart Canvas + Sidebar Filter + Drill Down
color_mood: Muted academic palette; accent for selected
typography_mood: Compact system sans for dense data
key_effects: Drill-down expand 250ms; selection highlight; cross-filter fade 200ms
decision_rules: Cross-filter linked charts on selection; undo for all filter actions; breadcrumb for drill-path
anti_patterns: Charts that don't update on filter; no export; no undo for filter changes

recommended_pattern: KPI Summary + Candlestick + P&L Table
color_mood: Trust navy + red/green replaced with up/down arrows
typography_mood: System serif for numbers; monospace optional
key_effects: Minimal animation; row stripe hover; sort 150ms; sparkline in table
decision_rules: Use candlestick not pie; prefix gains with up/down arrow not just color; freeze header on scroll
anti_patterns: Pie charts for portfolio; color-only gain/loss; non-sticky headers on long tables

recommended_pattern: Two-Pane + Toolbar + Bottom Sheet Mobile
color_mood: Neutral with accent for active
typography_mood: Clean system sans; system mono for code
key_effects: Pane resize 150ms; toolbar hover 100ms; task checkbox spring
decision_rules: Keyboard shortcuts documented; focus management on task complete; undo for all destructive actions
anti_patterns: Tasks without keyboard shortcuts; bulk actions hidden in context menu only; no undo for delete

recommended_pattern: Infinite Feed + Story Bar + Bottom Nav Mobile
color_mood: Brand primary + neutral surface
typography_mood: Readable system sans; emoji-safe stack
key_effects: Pull-to-refresh; skeleton loader; presence animation 2s; reaction micro-animation
decision_rules: Skeleton loaders not spinners; infinite scroll with virtual list; report/block always accessible
anti_patterns: Autoplay video with sound; infinite scroll without skip option; no pause on notification feed

recommended_pattern: Wizard Flow + Dashboard + Profile
color_mood: Medical blue + success green + warning amber
typography_mood: System sans 18px+ for readability; accessible line-height 1.6
key_effects: Gentle transitions 200ms; no flicker; accessible focus ring 4px
decision_rules: AA contrast mandatory; test with screen reader; every error must have recovery path; no jargon
anti_patterns: Small font sizes; complex navigation; medical jargon without explanation; aggressive animation
source: WCAG 2.2 AAA / HIPAA / Apple HIG Accessibility

recommended_pattern: Wizard Flow + Progress Bar + Achievement Cards
color_mood: Warm inviting; achievement gold
typography_mood: Rounded friendly 16px+; generous line-height
key_effects: Achievement bounce 500ms; progress fill 400ms; gentle hover
decision_rules: Celebrate progress with positive feedback; always show what's next; no punishment states
anti_patterns: Negative feedback; failure state without recovery path; countdown timers on learning

recommended_pattern: Hero + Social Proof + Feature Strips + CTA
color_mood: Brand vivid + white + CTA contrast
typography_mood: Bold heading; clear body; CTA 16px+
key_effects: Scroll-triggered reveals 400ms; counter 800ms; testimonial fade
decision_rules: A/B test headline copy; single conversion goal per page; social proof above fold
anti_patterns: Multiple CTAs competing; autoplay video; no mobile version; excessive animation distracts from CTA

recommended_pattern: Article + TOC Sidebar + Related + Author
color_mood: Warm off-white; editorial black
typography_mood: Readable serif body 18px; heading contrast
key_effects: None; smooth anchor scroll; progress bar on read
decision_rules: Table of contents on desktop; reading progress; generous padding 40px+ body; author bio
anti_patterns: No ToC for long articles; tiny body text; excessive ads interrupting reading flow

recommended_pattern: Sidebar Nav + Markdown Content + Code Blocks
color_mood: Clean light + dark mode toggle; code syntax
typography_mood: System sans body; monospace code 14px+
key_effects: None; syntax highlight; copy-code button; anchor links
decision_rules: Search front-and-center; versioned docs; copy-code on all code blocks; anchor links on headings
anti_patterns: No search; no dark mode; code without copy button; no version switcher

recommended_pattern: Hero Statement + Work Grid + About + Contact
color_mood: Dark artist or clean white; personal brand accent
typography_mood: Display/heading contrast; body system sans
key_effects: Hover scale 1.02 200ms; lazy-load blur-to-sharp; page transition 300ms
decision_rules: Keep to < 10 featured projects; full-width images; no dead links; contact form accessible
anti_patterns: Too many projects; small thumbnails; dead links; inaccessible contact (email only)

recommended_pattern: Step Progress + Single Task Per Screen + Celebration
color_mood: Friendly primary + success confirmation
typography_mood: Clear 16px+; generous 1.5 line-height; button 16px+
key_effects: Step slide 300ms; progress fill; celebration confetti optional+reducedMotion
decision_rules: One task per screen max; always show step N of M; skip option for optional steps; undo on critical steps
anti_patterns: Multiple inputs per screen; no progress indication; no skip option; aggressive time pressure

recommended_pattern: Prompt Input + Response Stream + History Sidebar
color_mood: Neural blue dark or clean AI light; token color for provider
typography_mood: Monospace for code blocks; system sans for UI
key_effects: Stream text fade-in 50ms per character; typing indicator; smooth scroll to bottom
decision_rules: Streaming response; copy button on all outputs; token/cost display; keyboard-first; clear current session
anti_patterns: Blocking spinner during stream; no copy button; no session history; mixed provider colors without badge

recommended_pattern: Section List + Form Fields + Save Confirmation
color_mood: Neutral slate; minimal accent
typography_mood: System sans 16px; form labels clear
key_effects: Instant save toast 3s; toggle animation 150ms; section anchor scroll
decision_rules: Group settings logically; section headings; instant save with undo (no Save button if auto-save); keyboard-accessible toggles
anti_patterns: Confusing grouping; Save button far from changed field; no confirmation of save; discard without warning

recommended_pattern: Search Bar + Filters + Results Grid or List + Pagination
color_mood: Neutral; accent for selected filters; match score highlight
typography_mood: System sans; keyword bold in results
key_effects: Filter animate 200ms; result fade-in stagger 50ms per row; pagination smooth
decision_rules: Show result count; allow result layout toggle (grid/list); URL-encoded filters; preserve scroll on back
anti_patterns: No result count; filters that reset scroll; pagination that loses filter state

recommended_pattern: Feed List + Mark-All-Read + Filter
color_mood: Neutral; unread bold contrast; action color
typography_mood: System sans 16px; timestamp muted
key_effects: Notification fade 200ms; unread dot pulse 2s; mark-read animation
decision_rules: Group by date; mark all read; filter by type; keyboard navigation; clear-all with undo
anti_patterns: Unread counts without clear mechanism; no grouping; no keyboard navigation; permanent notifications with no dismiss

recommended_pattern: Error Message + Suggested Actions + Navigation
color_mood: Neutral; one accent for primary CTA
typography_mood: Clear headline 32px+; body 18px; CTA 16px
key_effects: None; single fade-in 200ms
decision_rules: Explain what went wrong; suggest 2-3 recovery paths; maintain nav context; never blame user
anti_patterns: Technical error codes only; dead-end page with no links back; blame user language; too complex

recommended_pattern: Comparison Table + Feature Matrix + CTA + FAQ
color_mood: Trust blue + accent for recommended tier
typography_mood: Bold headings; clear feature list; CTA contrast
key_effects: Plan hover highlight 200ms; toggle annual/monthly; recommended badge
decision_rules: Highlight recommended plan; toggle billing period; FAQ for objections; no hidden features
anti_patterns: Too many tiers (>4); missing feature comparison; no FAQ; features vague without explanation

recommended_pattern: Single Field Per Screen + Social Login + Progress
color_mood: Clean neutral; primary brand CTA
typography_mood: Readable 16px; error red with icon; success green with icon
key_effects: Field focus ring; error shake 150ms; submit loading state; oauth button hover
decision_rules: One field per step; social login first; password strength meter; show/hide password; no captcha before submit
anti_patterns: Multiple fields first screen without flow; captcha on first attempt; no password visibility toggle; no social auth

recommended_pattern: Provider Grid + Session Log + Observation Panel
color_mood: IJFW palette; provider color-coded badges
typography_mood: System sans for UI; monospace for logs; compact density
key_effects: Provider badge color transition 300ms; log stream 50ms fade; observation ticker
decision_rules: Color-code providers; show active/idle state; observation trail visible; export session log
anti_patterns: Mixed provider output without attribution; no active state; no observation trail; no export

recommended_pattern: Map Canvas + Layer Control + Tooltip + Legend
color_mood: Neutral bg; map colors per standard; accent for selection
typography_mood: System sans for labels; compact for legend
key_effects: Zoom transition 200ms; tooltip fade 150ms; cluster animation
decision_rules: Cluster at high zoom; tooltip on hover+focus; accessible layer toggle; scale legend
anti_patterns: Map overlay with only color; no zoom for colorblind users; no keyboard pan

recommended_pattern: Player + Queue Sidebar + Recommendation Grid
color_mood: Dark bg; thumbnail color; CTA red/accent
typography_mood: System sans 16px for UI; subtitle 18px minimum
key_effects: Play hover overlay; recommendation hover scale 1.02 200ms; progress bar scrub
decision_rules: Keyboard-accessible player controls; subtitles on by default; picture-in-picture; quality selector
anti_patterns: Autoplay with sound; no keyboard controls; subtitles opt-in only; quality hidden in menu

recommended_pattern: Search Input + Result List + Keyboard Shortcuts
color_mood: Dark frosted or clean light; accent for selected; muted for shortcuts
typography_mood: Monospace for shortcuts; system sans for labels
key_effects: Open/close fade 150ms; result highlight instant; scroll-to-selected
decision_rules: Keyboard shortcut for open (Cmd+K); fuzzy search; keyboard-only navigation; recent actions at top
anti_patterns: Mouse-only; no shortcut to open; no fuzzy match; no recent actions

recommended_pattern: Single Metric + Sparkline + Trend Badge + Actions
color_mood: Neutral card; status color with text; accent for primary
typography_mood: System sans; mono for numbers; compact
key_effects: Hover reveal actions 150ms; sparkline draw 400ms; counter up 800ms
decision_rules: Show metric + trend together; actions on hover (not always visible); link to detail page
anti_patterns: Widget with metric only and no trend; actions always visible cluttering grid; no detail link
